owned_files.notes: 6 .rs files: asteroid.rs (670 LOC, voxel sparse octree + ore veins), heightmap.rs (335 LOC, 16-biome heightmap terrain), planet.rs (205 LOC, planet definition + LOD), planet_registry.rs (141 LOC, registry from data/), icosphere.rs (158 LOC, recursive subdivision), mod.rs (11 LOC, module list).
4 .rs files: fibonacci.rs (768 LOC, fibonacci spiral deck generation), rooms.rs (204 LOC, room mesh generation), layout.rs (185 LOC, RON layout parser), mod.rs (8 LOC). Loads from data/ships/.

gaps: No streaming/chunk loading for large planet surfaces (LOD exists but no on-demand mesh swap with worker threads)
Material/texture variety per biome relies on a small set of procedural shaders — no per-biome material assignment beyond color
Biome variety: 16 heightmap biomes exist, but blending and transitions are basic
No erosion or geological simulation feedback into terrain meshes
Asteroid/planet greedy mesher not yet shared with ship rooms (potential dedup opportunity)
summary: Terrain (icosphere planets + heightmaps + voxel asteroids) and ship interiors (fibonacci layouts + rooms) are all wired and shipping. No TODO/FIXME markers found, but registry's active gaps (streaming, materials, biome variety) remain real.
